repo.description: Cool vision, learning, and graphics papers on Cats!

terms.context_snippet: As reported by Cisco, 90% of net traffic will be visual, and indeed, most of the visual data are cat photos and videos. Thus, understanding, modeling, and synthesizing our feline friends becomes a more and more critical research problem these days, especially for our cat lovers.
